name: FigmaMaster Lore
desc: Modular Figma knowledge base for AI-assisted design. 383 records across 10 JSONL modules covering Figma operations, design systems, components, auto layout, iOS/Android design, responsive patterns, mobile UX, file organization, and DS audit/optimization.

name: Figma Core
desc: Figma fundamentals: frames vs groups vs sections, layers, constraints, boolean ops, masks, fills, strokes, effects, text, export, prototyping, dev mode, keyboard shortcuts

name: Auto Layout
desc: Auto layout system: horizontal/vertical/wrap/grid directions, packed/space-between spacing, hug/fill/fixed sizing, min-max constraints, padding, alignment, absolute position, nested patterns, grid auto layout (2025), responsive patterns, common spacing values

name: Design System Architecture
desc: Design system fundamentals: three-layer token model (primitive/semantic/component), variables (color/number/string/boolean/alias), collections, modes, light/dark setup, multi-brand, styles vs variables, color/text/effect/grid styles, scoping, library publishing, token naming, governance

name: Components
desc: Component system: creating components, 4 property types (boolean/text/instance-swap/variant), variants, component sets, nested components, compound components, slots (2025), instance overrides, detaching, naming conventions, preferred values, documentation, advanced patterns (states/responsive/skeleton/error)

name: iOS Design (Apple HIG)
desc: Apple Human Interface Guidelines: iPhone 16/15/14/SE screen sizes (pt), safe area insets, Dynamic Island, navigation bar (96pt), tab bar (83pt), home indicator, touch targets (44pt min), SF Pro typography (all sizes+tracking), SF Symbols, 8pt grid, corner radii, iOS color system, dark mode, bottom sheets, modals, lists, common patterns

name: Android Design (Material 3)
desc: Material Design 3: device sizes (dp), window size classes, bottom nav (80dp), top app bar, navigation rail/drawer, touch targets (48dp min), Roboto typography (15 tokens), M3 color system (HCT), tonal palettes, color roles, Dynamic Color/Material You, shape system (10-step radius), elevation (tonal), 4dp/8dp grid, M3 Expressive (2025), predictive back, edge-to-edge

name: Responsive Design
desc: Responsive design: breakpoints (mobile/tablet/desktop), Figma constraints system, auto layout responsive patterns (fluid/wrap/sidebar/stacking/grid), responsive components strategy (4 approaches), responsive variables (2025), pixel density (@1x-@4x), fluid typography, responsive grids (4/8/12 col), adaptive vs responsive, testing methodology

name: Mobile UX Patterns
desc: Cross-platform mobile UX: navigation patterns (bottom nav/tabs/drawer/FAB), thumb zone design, gesture vocabulary (tap/swipe/pinch/long-press), WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility (contrast/targets/screen-readers/motion), loading states (skeleton/spinner/progress), empty states, error handling, onboarding, form design, keyboard handling, dark mode UX, offline patterns, performance perception

name: File Organization
desc: Figma file organization: single vs multi-library architecture, page organization (cover/getting-started/components/playground/deprecated), section usage and color-coding, naming conventions (layers/components/pages/variables/styles), multi-file library dependencies, component library grouping, design debt management, dev handoff best practices, version control/branching, governance policies, documentation patterns

name: Audit & Optimization
desc: Design system audit and optimization: find detached instances, unused components, duplicate/mergeable components, hardcoded colors/spacing/typography, naming audit, variant explosion analysis, nesting depth check, auto layout coverage, variable coverage metrics, health score calculation, merge strategies, variant reduction, style-to-variable migration, pre-publish checklist, quarterly audit cadence, scan script templates
